summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Resend email service integration and password reset functionality. All critical password reset features are working correctly with strong validation rules implemented.

minor_issues.issue: Rate limiting appears to work (429 errors received) but test methodology needs refinement
minor_issues.impact: Test reliability issue, not functional issue

minor_issues.issue: CORS allows all origins (*) - security consideration

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/auth/forgot-password endpoint working - accepts email and processes reset requests
✅ GET /api/auth/password-rules endpoint working - returns proper validation rules (min 12 chars)
✅ Password validation properly rejects weak passwords (short, no uppercase, no lowercase, no numbers, no special chars, common patterns, sequences)
✅ Forgot password page loads at /forgot-password with proper form
✅ Reset password page loads at /reset-password with token parameter
✅ Password strength indicator shows correctly on reset password page
✅ Login page has 'Forgot your password?' link that navigates properly
✅ Password Reset Modal appears for admin login requiring password change
✅ Password Reset Modal has password strength indicator working
✅ Form validation prevents submission of weak passwords (submit button disabled)
✅ Form validation enables submission for strong passwords
✅ Reset password page redirects to forgot password when no token provided
✅ Forgot password form submission shows success message
✅ Password strength rules checklist displays properly (12+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special chars, no common patterns, no sequences)
success_percentage: Backend: 80% (8/10 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (14/15 features tested successfully)
